long-title: Different systems (like health and social services) use different words for things

content: People who run the different systems

sections.long-title: What are the causes of the problem?
content: A range of different words used by different people
Systems that do not talk to each other
Systems that are not joined up
everyone using the same words
using words that are easy to understand
making sure letters to patients and the public are easy to understand
letting people tell us when words are too complex
systems that can be changed if needed
staff training
good policies
good systems

sections.long-title: What actions are involved in doing something about this?
content: talking with people using services
knowing all the different words and what they mean
agreeing on a common list of words across our region
making sure these words are easy to understand
making sure systems are in place to write information that is easy to understand and use simple words
setting goals for meeting targets
developing a role for facilitators

sections.long-title: How will we deliver these actions?
content: develop data systems that talk with each other
develop a set of words that everyone agrees on
make sure everyone knows what these words mean
develop online and IT tools
use Artificial Intelligence
training courses on what words to use

sections.long-title: What do we expect to come out of these actions?
content: less use of acronyms
clear languages used across systems
more awareness of health literacy
better understanding between systems
better patient and public understanding of materials
information that is more sensitive to different cultures

sections.long-title: How will we know things have changed?
content: feedback from people who use the system
random checks
more different systems involved
more organisations trained
cost savings

sections.long-title: What short term changes will we see?
content: We will have action plans in place
systems will work better for patients
more organisations will be involved
more materials will be re-written
better use of resources

sections.long-title: What do we think will happen in the longer term (3 years)? For example, increased health literacy, better disease control, improved health
content: Information that is easier to understand
systems using the same words as each other
systems that are easier to use

sections.long-title: What are the current activities in this area?
